Prompt injection detection scanner (Hermes pattern). Build/Plan mode separation for agents (OpenCode pattern). Plan agent is read-only (cannot edit files, must ask permission for bash). Build agent has full access. Scout operates in Plan mode, Coder/Worker in Build mode. Separates exploration from mutation. From OpenCode dual-agent paradigm. Easy: maps to existing SwarmRole system.

Deploy LiteLLM as cloud routing layer (replace CloudFallbackMatrix). LiteLLM is a battle-tested open-source gateway: OpenAI API on both sides, supports 100+ providers, automatic retry/fallback/load balancing/spend tracking. Replace hand-rolled CloudFallbackMatrix in config.rs. Run alongside CLIAPIProxy. Point SWARM_CLOUD_URL at LiteLLM. From Awesome-LLMOps.

Declarative agent definition files (CodeBuff .agents pattern). Define SwarmRoles as declarative TOML/RON configs instead of hardcoded Rust. Each definition specifies: model tier, available tools, system prompt template, delegation targets, invocation criteria, spawnerPrompt (when other agents should invoke this one). From CodeBuff .agents AgentDefinition format

Best-of-N sampling with judge selection (CodeBuff thinker pattern). Generate N candidate solutions from the same model, then have a judge (higher-tier model) select the best. Add as ensemble strategy alongside existing majority/weighted/unanimous voting. From CodeBuff thinker agent. Easy: add to ensemble/ module.

Thread spawn depth limiting for sub-tasks (Codex pattern). Cap sub-task recursion depth in modes/deepthink.rs JoinSet fan-out. Registry prevents excessive sub-agent nesting. Add max_depth parameter to concurrent subtask dispatch. From Codex thread spawn depth limiting. Easy: add depth counter to dispatch.

Structured patch operations with safety assessment (Codex pattern). Replace raw git patch generation with structured Add/Delete/Update operations. Add assess_patch_safety() that checks: file size delta, number of deletions, whether safety-critical files are touched, blast radius estimate. Run assessment BEFORE applying patch. From Codex apply_patch pattern. Easy-Med

LSP tool for agents via rust-analyzer (OpenCode pattern). Add rust-analyzer LSP queries (go-to-definition, find-references, diagnostics, hover info) as an agent tool. Execution policy rules files for shell safety (Codex pattern). Make shell_safety.rs configurable via per-repo .rules files with prefix matching. Commands classified as Allow/Prompt/Forbidden. BANNED_PREFIX_SUGGESTIONS prevents unsafe auto-corrections. Heuristic rules and network protocol rules. From Codex execution policy system. Medium: new config format + rul

Consensus voting for high-risk changes: multi-model plan review. When risk_profile indicates high-risk (>5 files, public API, unsafe code): run the plan through 2-3 models (Opus + Gemini Pro + Sonnet/Codex). Each returns approve/reject + feedback. 2/3 approval required to proceed. Otherwise revise with combined feedback. New file: crates/swarm-agents/src/consensu
